message:
feat: Implement remaining stub functionalities

smtplib.zig:
- starttls() with TLS state tracking and RFC 3207 compliance
- Added is_tls flag for protocol state management

gzip.zig:
- compress() now uses compresslevel parameter (0-9)
- Maps Python compression levels to Zig flate levels
- Sets XFL header flag based on compression mode

code.zig:
- runcode() with callback support for execution
- Tracks last_executed for session state
- AOT-compatible design with optional exec_callback

warnings.zig:
- Added call stack tracking infrastructure (pushFrame/popFrame)
- warn() now uses stacklevel parameter for caller resolution
- Thread-local call_stack for frame tracking
- FrameInfo struct with filename/lineno/function
